query: South Korea KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell value weekly latest June 2026, recent trend in trillion won
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of what I found on KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell activity through the latest available data (July 2–3, 2026):

**Key findings:**
- **H1 2026 total:** Record **148.32 trillion won** net sold by foreign investors on KOSPI (~$95B) — an unprecedented "Sell Korea" streak.
- **June 2026 (monthly):** **48.62 trillion won** net sold — the largest monthly figure, with ~52% concentrated in the final 8 trading days (June 19–30).
- **May 2026:** 44.71 trillion won net sold (>47tn across all domestic stocks — a record month).
- **Daily record:** June 30 saw a single-day record of **7.7332 trillion won** net sold.
- **Early July continuation:** A "Meta Shock" AI/semiconductor correction hit July 2 (KOSPI -7.89% to 7,648); foreigners net-sold 4.40tn that day and had sold for **10 straight trading days totaling 34.671 trillion won** through July 2.

**Trend & drivers:** The selloff began June 3 after the KOSPI's extraordinary ~101–109% YTD surge peaked. It's driven by profit-taking/rebalancing, won depreciation (USD/KRW rose to 1,549), and concentrated selling in Samsung Electronics (16-year-low foreign ownership) and SK Hynix. Domestic individuals (+99tn) and institutions (+35tn) absorbed much of the selling.

**Caveat:** No exact Monday–Friday weekly aggregate is published in these sources; the closest weekly-scale proxies are the 8-day streak (~25.4tn, June 19–30) and 10-day streak (34.671tn through July 2). Full structured data delivered via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: Foreign investors' record Kospi sell-off may continue in second half as won weakens
sources.snippet: Record 148.32 trillion won net selling in H1 2026; May–June 92.89tn; record single-day 7.76tn; won depreciated 66.1 won.

sources.title: Foreign Investors Dump 150 Trillion Won in KOSPI in First Half
sources.snippet: June 2026: 48.6248tn net sold; May: 44.7147tn; H1: 149.0436tn; June 30 record 7.7332tn; 52.2% concentrated in final 8 trading days.

sources.title: Kospi selloff is rebalancing, not vote against South Korea: KRX CEO
sources.snippet: Selloff began June 3; KOSPI grew 76% in 2025 and up 108.85% YTD before selloff; June 8 net sell 1.24tn; rebalancing described as inevitable.

sources.title: Korea Stock Market Sheds 569 Trillion Won as Meta Joins Apple, OpenAI
sources.snippet: July 2 foreign net sell 4.4048tn; 10 consecutive trading days of selling totaling 34.671tn; KOSPI closed 7,648.09.

sources.title: KOSPI Plunges 7.89% on 'Meta Shock,' SK hynix Sinks 14%
sources.snippet: KOSPI fell 655.32 points (7.89%) to 7,648.09 on July 2 amid AI/semiconductor excess-capacity fears.

sources.title: Foreigners Dump $106.8 Billion of Kospi Stocks in First Half as Samsung Ownership Hits 16-Year Low
sources.snippet: Net sellers of 148.316tn on Kospi in H1; selling concentrated in Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix; KOSPI surged 101.14%.

sources.title: Foreign Investors Offload Record 47 Trillion Won in Korean Stocks, Yet Ownership Hits All-Time High
sources.snippet: May 2026: over 47tn net sold across domestic stocks (record); foreign ownership ratio past 35%, all-time high (FSS report).

sources.title: Foreign Investors Dump Record 103 Trillion Won on KOSPI This Year
sources.snippet: Foreign net selling reached record 103tn YTD by early June; 18 consecutive months of net selling.

sources.title: Kospi buy-side sidecar triggered as index rebounds above 8,000
sources.snippet: July 3 buy-side sidecar triggered as Kospi 200 futures surged >5%, led by Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix.
